entry.title: Re: SAP Build apps, HTML 5 issue
entry.content:
Hi @TonyKVG69,

did you enable Cloud Identity Services in Work Zone: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/integration-to-app-builder#deployed-applications?

Best regards,

Laura

entry.title: How to transfer stock from one customer stock (W) to another customer stock (W)
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

 

Is there a way to transfer stock from one customer stock (W) to another customer stock (W)?

We usually transfer this stock from our main storage location to customer stock using MB11 movement type=631.

 

Thanks,

Rishabh

entry.title: Re: Logo printing on label output from Zebra printer
entry.content:
Hi Srivastava,

 I link you mentioned is no more exist, could you check and share again please!

 

Thanks,

Anil

entry.title: Re: Analysis for Office - Logon was successful - Loading Screen
entry.content:
Hi Lorenz,
I would suggest to record an AO trace using the latest version of the tool, which might help to identify why AO is hanging in the logon screen. You can download AO 2.8 SP21 by following the instructions in section #2 of Support Content page https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sapao/3361385442.html.
Then refer to SAP Note 2129389 to record the traces. The AO traces can be opened in any text editor.

entry.title: Re: In SAP B1, is it possible to run Depreciation run job...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

AssetDocument is a business object that represents the header data of asset documents in the Fixed Asset function of SAP Business One application.

With SAP Business One, you can carry out a series of transactions for your fixed assets as follows:

  • Capitalization
  • Capitalization Credit Memo
  • Retirement
  • Transfer
  • Manual Depreciation

Source table: OACQ.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: How to transfer tariff number (schema type ‘101’ ) from GTS to ECC?
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

 

we are using number schema type-101 Tariff numbers in the product master legal control tab and maintaining the export license accordingly.

 

Is there any standard way to transfer these tariff numbers from GTS to ECC material master?

I have already checked standard cockpit-->system monitoring-->Synchronization --> Transfer commodity codes but it is not allowing me to use legal regulation with legal code= Foreign Trade law.

It only shows legal regulation which has custom processing enabled.

 

Thanks,

Rishabh

entry.title: Re: Add fields to header data (Clear G/L Accounts; Manual...
entry.content:
Hi @gajanthan ,

Did you find a solution?

Thanks in advance.

 

br,

Andras

entry.title: Re: Cds with aggregation between adcoda and vendor inform...
entry.content: Hi, I am using the data from ACDOCA and BSEG. The Vendor information in the results screen shot is coming from BSEG.

entry.title: Re: In SAP B1, is it possible to run Depreciation run job...
entry.content: Correct sir, this is what I found in DI-API documentation, but we will have to do manual depreciation, since depreciation run object is not exposed.

entry.title: Re: Discover SAP BTP’s Strategy and Roadmap Highlights
entry.content: I would also be interested in the slides 🙂 Extremly valuable content so far from what i have seen in this blog series

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP-based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on-premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday 24th April 2024 in Bengaluru, India from 9:00 - 16:00 IST. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructors are Developer Advocates Sheena M K , Shilpa Shankar and Ajay Soreng. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

Location: Applied Materials India Pvt. Limited, Wing- 2, Titanium Conference room, 1st Floor Innovator, ITPL, Whitefield - 560066

The event is kindly being hosted by Applied Materials India Pvt, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Group Reporting: Custom fields not included in data release for plandata
entry.content:
We have implemented a couple of custom fields, both in accounting and in Group Reporting. This works fine and in the data release task, this specification is flowing from ACDOCA to ACDOCU. However if we release a plancategory, the custom fields are not taken into account. We do see the data in the ACDOCP, but not in the acdocU. And if we open the mapping option in the result screen, we don't see the the fields either for plancategories, however, we do see them for actual data. 

How can we make sure this data does flow in from ACDOCP to ACDOCU?

entry.title: Re: Odata service for My Inbox - Approve Purchase Order not found error
entry.content: Hi did you fingd a solution to this, as I am facing the same issue too, please let me know for any information or solution, thanks

entry.title: Re: How to transfer stock from one customer stock (W) to...
entry.content:
Hello @rishabh_sinha1986 

To my knowledge there is no standard movement type for such a one step transfer. You need to transfer from W special stock to unrestricted, anonymous stock and then from there to another W special stock.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Dates and Roundings in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec ,

In the variable pay worksheet, I want to make a percent field round to nearest decimal, example:

If I use formula: round('halfUp',(customTeamBonus/customTarget)) output is 100.00%

If I use formula: customTeamBonus/customTarget, output is 89.99%

Team Bonus = 4,793, Custom target = 5,326, I am expecting the output to display as 90.00%.

Please can you help.

 

Thanks,

Swagatika

entry.title: Re: Client certificate based Authorization in AS2 adapter?
entry.content:
You can refer to the package "Integration Flow Design Guidelines - Use the Partner Directory Appropriately" which has sample iFlows for this scenario and links to an in-depth blog (Neo based) and the pertinent sections of the SAP help.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: SAP Transportation Management Analytics
entry.content:
Turning Insights into Action

Modern Supply chains are looking for predictive and actionable insights into logistics activities to manage today’s business challenges, yet it can be overwhelming knowing where to start. Having a logistics dashboard tailored for your business, can increase a logistics managers view of arrival and departure performance,  freight costs and carrier billing. In this blog, I'll take you through the analytics dashboard available for SAP Transportation Management using SAP Analytics Cloud. Some of the data points are from Fleet management. 

SAP TM Dasboard

Topics I'll be covering in this blog:

  • How does the SAP Transportation Management dashboard work?
  • What KPI's can be tracked in SAP Transportation Management?
  • Dashboard Overview

How does the dashboard work?

With the integration of SAC, users can monitor strategic and operational transportation KPIs in real-time, analyze transportation processes, assess issues and take immediate actions. All of these functions are role based giving the users a better user experience.

What KPI's can be tracked in SAP Transportation Management?

The dashboard contains 2 main elements - Shipment Execution KPI Dashboard and the Fleet Optimization and customer service level KPIs.

                         Shipment Execution KPI Dashboard                  Fleet Optimization and customer service level KPIs

Within these 2 dashboards numerous KPI's can be tracked - 

  • Transportation planning
  • Shipment Execution
  • Transportation Cost Analysis
  • Customer Service Levels
  • Financial Overview
  • Fleet Management

Dashboard Overview

Shipment Execution

Transportation Planning

SAP TM can manage  inbound, outbound and a combination of inbound and outbound logistics. What does this mean? When a truck goes out to deliver a shipment, the truck can be planned to collect uplifts, returns or even inbound stock based on a completely different Purchase Order. 

A Transportation Executive can have a look at the overall status of deliveries that are late or on-hold to take immediate action as well checking the performance of a carrier's performance. A carrier can be measured against their service level agreements. Filters can be used to analyze specific routes or shipment lanes. 

 

Transportation Cost Analysis

Transportation Management always comes down to the dollars and cents. Saving just a few dollars on each shipment will add up over the course of 1 financial year saving money and freeing up resources.

The Transportation Manager or Finance Director can see detail of the Freight Costs. They can visualize the cost distribution by carrier, product and invoice charge analysis by carrier, mode and order type. They can see a summary view such as total gross weight, total invoice charge, and average cost. This comes in handy as one of the parameters used in transportation is weight. The shipper or customer can have an in depth view of the products being transported and the costs associated with them. 

Fleet Optimization 

Fleet OptimizationThe Finance Overview gives the Transportation Manager a comprehensive view of transportation organization's statistics and performance. The profitability can also be analyzed by different KPI's measured. 

KPI criteria shows the volume in bubbles on the map for each country which represents a market unit. Deep analysis can also be done for revenue, gross margins, costs, returns, etc. The cost distribution can also can also be seen by carrier, mode or order type giving insights into business. 

To find some more information on KPI's in SAP Transportation Management, you can visit SAP Transportation Management | SAP Help Portal. 

This blog was a functional overview of the dashboards in SAP Analytics Cloud for SAP Transportation Management and Fleet Management. 


In my next blog I plan to cover the Analytics available for SAP Extended Warehouse Management. Thank you for reading my blog, please share your feedback in the comments section.

For more updates on Transportation Management please visit  https://community.sap.com/topics/transportation-management

If you have any questions on Transportation Management please visit https://answers.sap.com/tags/01200615320800000686

Feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn http://www.linkedin.com/in/ravine-lala-logistics .

entry.title: Re: CAP Java - Destination - Proxy Configuration
entry.content: Hello @Ivan-Mirisola, thank you! We were missing the binding for the connectivity service. Now the destination can be used as expected. The proxy configuration is set as well and points to some connectivityproxy.internal.* url. Best regards, Moritz

entry.title: Re: Unable to trigger Returns order for In-house repair
entry.content:
The issue turned out to be a missing entry in IMG Activity under Activate and Rename Follow-Up Activities for:

0001 - Receive into Plant

entry.title: Re: NEW SAP GRC certification?
entry.content:
Hi @m_arshad_grc 
The C_GRCAC SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP Access is retired without a successor.

Please access our Certification Transformation site. There you find all the details on the new SAP Certification program. Use the Certification Recommendation documentation and learn how your certification will be affected with the upcoming SAP Certification program changes and what you will need to do to stay certified. 

If your SAP Certification will expire without a recommended alternative:
Explore the SAP Certification portfolio to continue developing the right skills for your role.
Find learning solutions to validate your SAP knowledge, stay relevant, and ensure your certification remain current beyond March 31, 2025.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Remove blank lightbox pop-up in SAP Companion
entry.content: I sometimes see this where there is some SAP-standard content that is set to display (such as Quick Start/Tour, etc) but it can't actually reach that content to display it (usually because of connection or authentication issues). Try setting enableQuickTourSupport=false and see if that helps (it may not, depending on exactly what is making these 'announcements'.

entry.title: Re: All SAP ECC 6.0 systems now connect to SAP Signavio Process Insights: Unlocking new transformati
entry.content:
Hello
Is it possible to connect SAP Signavio Process Insights to a Non SAP System? Please share your inputs.

entry.title: Error during build/deploy .hdbgrants file.
entry.content:
Hello,

       I add the .hdbgrants file and executed "Build". I get the below error as in the screen shot. So far I have checked the Remote Source HANADB and its credentials and they seem to be OK. 

 

The Remote Source details as below

 

The Tenant database seem to enabled and running fine and I have added "User Provided Services" as in the below screen shot.

 

What am I missing?  How do I rectify the error and deploy .hdbgrants file?

 

Regards,

Shishir. P

entry.title: Calculating age and tenure
entry.content:
Hello,

For the SAC story, I need to calculate for any chosen date, not only for today/current server date:

  • an employee's age based on the date of birth
  • an employee's tenure based on the job starting date

My model has two dimensions: Employee and Date (day granularity) and several metrics like working hours, salary etc.

I take the Date of birth and the Job starting date from the source (HANA) and keep them as properties of the dimension Employee, so now it's of Text type. 

What's the best practice for doing this?

  1. How should I keep these dates in the SAC model - as Date dimensions or as properties of the Employee dimension? I doubt making them Date dimensions as I'm concerned regarding the size, as the date of birth could be far longer in the past (in the previous century). And as properties, they could be only of Text type
  2. How do we calculate this date difference from the chosen date (through input control) if the dates are text properties?

Many thanks,

Yuri

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Form : No tax available to display on purchase item
entry.content: Dear Employee, the suggested link shows the following message: Not Found The requested URL was not found on this server. Additionally, a 404 Not Found error was encountered while trying to use an ErrorDocument to handle the request.

entry.title: Re: Cost planning integration between Controlling and Finance table ACDOCP
entry.content:
Hi Paulo,

why could be designed in this way. 
- if there is a problem with balance for 42 cost type -> error message. 
- if balance is ok -> execute transfer. 

BR Dmitrii

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements and "Unsupported OData Version 4.01"
entry.content:
Hi @Sschlegel ,

I am facing this very same problem after creating a simple test scenario on SAP BTP Trial, and using the "Generate ABAP Repository Objects" from ADT.

The test base table only uses a few standard SAP data elements. The generation wizard offers only the possibility of using OData V4.

Do you have any suggestions?

maybe  /LIME/NQUAN is helpful?

entry.title: PS budget migration from legacy system
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

If it possible to migrate PS full budget data (original budget/ budget consumption) from legacy system to a new S/4HANA system. For example : WBS in legacy system the original budget = 1000, consumption = 800, available = 200. In general, I will only migrate original budget = 200 to new system, because I will not migrate all the detail transactions of the WBS. But my customer's requirement is migrate  original budget = 1000, consumption = 800 to new system because they want to trace the full cycle in new system. If someone have the same experience? By the way, the WBS is real WBS not statistic.

Thanks and Best Regards,

entry.title: How can we create a customer influence in S/4HANA for P2P
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone give me the right link to post a customer influence for S/4 in Procurement? 

We need to raise a business needs for the creation of a vendor calendar in order to :

- Put the holiday of the supplier on this calendar

- Based on these holidays, create pop up to users

- Based on these holiday, to have a link in MRP for the planning.

I only find the link to customer influence S/4 private, and no purchasing area inside.

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: DME format version upgradation from pain.001.002.03 to pain.001.001.09
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When version upgradation (DME format tree Z_SEPA_CT) from pain. 001.002.03 to pain. 001.001.09

DMEE Tree format level i changed version to pain.001.001.09 and in OBPM4 also i changed new one

I tested it on my side, and the system generated a DME file successfully, but when the bank does testing, a list of errors comes out. Could you please tell us what the problem is? 

Errors list:

     1 616 Error: The element must be empty.

     1 626 Error: The mandatory element

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/ReqdExctnDt/Dtor

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/ReqdExctnDt/DtTm is missing.

     1 680 Error: The mandatory element

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/Dbtr/PstlAdr/TwnNm is missing.

     1 696 Fatal error: Unexpected element AdrLine from the namespace

              'urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.09'.

     1 845 Fatal error: Unexpected element BIC from the namespace

              'urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.09'.

     1 866 Error: The mandatory element

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/BICFIor

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/Othr is missing.

     1 1083 Fatal error: Unexpected element BIC from the namespace

              'urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.09'.

     1 1104 Error: The mandatory element

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/CdtTrfTxInf[1]/CdtrAgt/FinInstnId

              /BICFI is missing.

     1 1170 Error: The mandatory element

              /Document/CstmrCdtTrfInitn/PmtInf[1]/CdtTrfTxInf[1]/Cdtr/PstlAdr/TwnNm

              missing.

     1 1186 Fatal error: Unexpected element AdrLine from the namespace

              'urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.09'.

     1 1216 Fatal error: Unexpected element AdrLine from the namespace

              'urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.09'.

 Best Regards,

Thilak Chagantipati

entry.title: Re: How to delete condition tables in testsystem
entry.content: you're right. It works like this. However, in my case, there was an entry in the table in the Q system, and because of that, it was not possible to delete

entry.title: Re: Web Services for Concur Expense - Updating Expense Reports and Entries
entry.content: Hi @thomas_vanlooy2 - Thanks for letting me know! The Github link is now working.

entry.title: Re: in RAP/OData how do I do a deep create through an association when the parent record already exi
entry.content:
Hi Team,
We have a similar requirement for posting multiple Items using Deep insert.
While we have successfully utilized RAP OData deep insert for single-item records, multiple-item records are proving to be a challenge. Specifically,  we are getting an error for duplicate key with multi-item records.
I would be grateful if you could provide insights on whether it is currently possible to post multiple items via RAP OData Deep Insert. Alternatively, please advise if we still need to use SEGW ODATA for Deep Insert.
@Andre_Fischer @volkerdrees 
Thanks,
Vishal

entry.title: Document Information Extraction Premium using the UI only - Process the Extraction Result (JSON)
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are looking into the functionality of Document Information Extraction (premium) on the SAP Business Technology Platform . We got the UI version working on a BTP trial environment and all looks promising, but not (yet) perfect. Since we receive lots of documents from lots of different parties, our intention at first would be to use only the UI to upload the documents. Uploading the documents and extraction the data works pretty good, but we now are trying to figure out how we can process the Extraction Result in a user friendly manner. So far, the only available option we've found is to download the Extraction Result in the requested format (JSON). The JSON file is then downloaded to my windows downloads folder.

Are there any other options to process the Extraction Result from the UI so it is pushed to / loaded in our SAP backend in a more automated manner. At this time, we are not (yet) interested to process the documents using the available APIs.

entry.title: Re: Received stock does not have inspection ID in ARM
entry.content:
Hi, check if this is helpful for you: 

Customizing: Quality Inspection in EWM under No In... - SAP Community

Quality inspection process for customer return sto... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: How to define ajax call in SAP MDK
entry.content: You will most likely want to use the ClientAPI sendRequest method which will return a promise with the HTTP response.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK attachment multi image selection at a time fo...
entry.content: At this time there is no workaround to enable multiple selection on iOS in MDK. You will need to select the attachments one at a time.

entry.title: Re: Error: Missing text secrets Build iOS
entry.content:
Guys, it appears that the problem has been fixed.
Check your projects and try compiling again, both for iOS and Android.

For me, as I created all the credentials correctly, both for iOS and Android, the compilation generated the .ipa (For iOS) and the apk (For Android) normally and without any errors.

entry.title: can i add notes to multiple orders at one time?
Re: iOS Distribution Certificate e Keystore Error
entry.content:
Guys, it appears that the problem has been fixed.

For me, as I created all the credentials correctly, both for iOS and Android, the compilation generated the .ipa (For iOS) and the apk (For Android) normally and without any errors.

Thanks

entry.title: Adding my SAP Build Workzone app in another SAP Fiori Launchapd
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a Launchpad in Workzone where I added several apps (HTML5 apps that were coming from SAP Build Apps, that i deployed in the BTP)

However, I want to have these apps as well in another Launchpad, SAP Fiori Launchpad.

Do you know how should I proceed?  thanks in advance

Image 1 : SAP Build Workzone Launchpad

Image 2 : SAP Fiori Launchpad

entry.title: Re: "Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a packa...
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

My post is not answer. 

My post is support this question, i agree with author of question that restriction has too small number of attempts, especially when developers have to use Joule with Fiori step where they need to interact actively with many requests, so restriction will stop their ability to make job done, even in small project which is just for POC or learning.

Thank you in advance,

Yours sincerely, Mikhail.

entry.title: Tips to add your SAP Build Apps application to different BTP environments - Part 3
entry.content:
Hi SAP Builders!

This is a follow up blog to Tips to add your SAP Build Apps application to different BTP environments - Part 1 and Tips to add your SAP Build Apps application to different BTP environments - Part 2, here I will continue to showcase 'how to add your deployed SAP Build Apps application to different environments in SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform)'.

In Part 3, let's focus on how to do this when the required services (SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition) are running in different subaccounts in SAP BTP (either within the same Global account or in different Global accounts).

Pre-requisites

  1. As indicated in the Solution diagram above, both Subaccounts must be connected to the same IAS configuration for SAP Cloud Identity Service.
  2. You know the URL of the deployed SAP Build Apps application. 

Hint: The direct URL of the deployed application can be always found in the HTML5 Applications repository section of your BTP Subaccount.

* NOTE: If a new version of the application is deployed to CF the URL would change, so we need to check for it again here to adjust any bookmark reference to your application. Only then we can continue to access the application without any issues.

Spoiler

If the URL is from an earlier deployment then the application will no longer be available for access.

Integrate your SAP Build Apps application to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

Design time configuration of SAP Build Apps in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

  • Create an application via ‘Content manager’.                                                                                              
  • Provide the required details, important is to copy the latest deployed URL of the SAP Build Apps and add / adjust * it under the field 'URL' in Configuration.

  • Add the application to all the required roles of your end user.

Integrate the application to the runtime

To add your application to the desired runtime environments in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition, refer to my previous blog post Tips to add your SAP Build Apps application to different BTP environments - Part 1 under the sections:

  1. Spaces and Pages New Experience
  2. Classic Launchpad with Groups
  3. New Launchpad with Spaces and Pages

Launch your SAP Build Apps application at runtime

When we configure our SAP Build Apps application as a URL application and launch it at runtime, we will be prompted to login. This is expected behavior as the SAP Build Apps service is running in a different Subaccount and is essential for metering.

If this is not desired, then configure the Default IDP for your organization to enable Single Sign On (SSO) login automatically.

      With this, I hope that you could also bookmark your deployed SAP Build Apps application (from a different Subaccount) to your SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition (in this Subaccount) and use it successfully.

Disclaimer: Bookmarking is a work around approach to use the SAP Build Apps application and may not function optimally at all times. Yet we are sharing this 'Know-how' as SAP Build Apps services is currently not supported in all data centres and accessing SAP Build Apps across different subaccounts (either within the same Global account or in different Global accounts) is a possible use case.

Spoiler
Coming up next,
In Part 4 of this blog series I will cover the same scenario for SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition.

Stay tuned and Happy building!

entry.title: Re: New Client Copy Tool
entry.content:
Hi Dominik,

I found that it is impossible to export and import clients from and to the same system and client. We and probably some more customers use this procedure in the context of system copies in order to backup and restore SAP users (with the old client copy).

Is there a reason in the new SCC7N to reject import post-processing that I have overlooked? To be precise, it is not rejecting SCC7N, it just says "client <nnn> is not ready for post-processing". At this point, tp has already overwritten the user data ...

Some time ago, I asked some similar thing: client 000 is generally not allowed for client imports, which is quite understandable, but not for backup/restore of SAP users?

Best regards,
Marcus

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements and "Unsupported OData Version 4.01"
entry.content:
@DouglasCezar ,

can you Post the Base-Table? The problem is, that OData V4 is the only right and good approach, but the fallback to OData V4.01 starts automatically, if you use "wrong" data elements, that are not compatible with OData V4

Regards
Sören

entry.title: Manage Workflows For Supplier Invoices - if certain amount is reached
entry.content:
Dear,

When entering a goods receipt based on a PO, the next step is to create an invoice > I need to be able to prevent an invoice from being posted if it exceeds a certain amount. I have checked the Fiori Tile “Manage Workflows for Supplier Invoices”  but there are only two pre-defined scenarios:

  • Workflow for Blocked Invoice
  • Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete

The issue is that even if the invoice is blocked for payment, it can still be posted in MIRO. And the parked invoice is not really relevant since it means that we need to always park an invoice to trigger the workflow.

Is there a standard solution today that corresponds to my request?

If we take the "Manage Workflows for Purchase Orders", we can directly indicate that if the PO is over a certain amount, then we need to approve this PO via the "My Inbox" tile. I wanted to have a similar flow with the supplier invoices.

Thank you already,

Dany R.

entry.title: Re: VBA Code - Automation
entry.content:
Solved it with an extra few lines of code to auto save before it requests to save.

session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0

entry.title: Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
See as well: 

  • Summary: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
  • Overview: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

SAP IAS SAML Metadata Retrieval

To retrieve SAML Metadata from SAP IAS:

  • enter the below SAP IAS URL into browser:
    https://<SAP IAS tenant  id>.accounts.ondemand.com/saml2/metadata?action=download
  •  store the downloaded SAP IAS Metadata File

SAP Ariba SAML Authentication Self-service Configuration (PLICM-871)

From 2402 release of "PLICM-871: Ability to Configure SAML Authentication Settings in Intelligent Configuration Manager" feature, customers can retrieve the SAP Ariba metadata file as self-service.

Note: In case of configuring the SSO setup for SAP Ariba Sourcing, SAP Ariba Contracts, SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance for suite-integrated tenants the SSO setup and thus the metadata retrieval needs to be executed on the SAP Ariba procurement tenant (e.g. for US DC https://<SAP Ariba tenant id>.procurement.ariba.com). In case of SAP Ariba multi-ERP configuration setup (f.k.a Federated Process Control FPC) the SSO configuration and metadata retrieval needs to happen for the parent tenant. 
For standalone (not suite-integrated) SAP Ariba sourcing tenant (e.g. for US DC https://<SAP Ariba tenant id>.sourcing.ariba.com)

Prerequisites:

  • SAP Ariba user with Third Party Enterprise User (Ariba) type 
  • SAP Ariba user with Customer Administrator group membership

To configure SAP Ariba SAML Authentication with SAP IAS:

  • enter the SAP Ariba tenant as per Note above using the Third Party Enterprise User (Ariba) login URL (e.g. for US DC https://<SAP Ariba tenant id>.procurement.ariba.com/?passwordadapter=ThirdPartyUser)
  • navigate to Manage -> (Core Administration - for SAP Ariba procurement tenant or Administration for SAP ariba sourcing tenant) -> Intelligent Configuration Manager -> Manage Configurations -> [Continue] -> Authentication -> [Update]
  • load the SAP IAS Metadata File you retrieved from SAP IAS
  • select Enable SAML authentication to Yes, to enable the SSO (all the data are pregonfigured from the imported SAP IAS Metadata File)
  • press [Submit]

  •  press [Approve]

  •  press [Apply] - after this step SAP Ariba SSO changes will take affect!

 

  • In case the Enable SAML authentication is set to Yes, SAP Ariba will use to authenticate the users credentials (passwords) stored in SAP IAS and not credentials (passwords) stored in SAP Ariba. Therefore SAP Ariba business users will need to be invited to SAP IAS, activate their accounts and create their user credentials (passwords)

 

  • In case the Enable SAML authentication is set to No, SAP Ariba will use to authenticate the users credentials (passwords) stored in SAP Ariba

Note: Users of type Third Party Enterprise User (Ariba), using the *?passwordadapter=ThirdPartyUser URL to login into SAP Ariba will always keep using credentials (passwords) stored in SAP Ariba, no matter of the SSO enablement

SAP Ariba SAML Metadata Retrieval (PLICM-871)

From 2402 release of "PLICM-871: Ability to Configure SAML Authentication Settings in Intelligent Configuration Manager" feature, customers can retrieve the SAP Ariba metadata file as self-service.

Note: In case of configuring the SSO setup for SAP Ariba Sourcing, SAP Ariba Contracts, SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance for suite-integrated tenants the SSO setup and thus the metadata retrieval needs to be executed on the SAP Ariba procurement tenant. In case of SAP Ariba multi-ERP configuration setup (f.k.a Federated Process Control FPC) the SSO configuration and metadata retrieval needs to happen for the parent tenant. 

Prerequisites:

  • SAP Ariba user with Customer Administrator group membership

To retrieve SAML Metadata from SAP Ariba:

  • enter the SAP Ariba tenant as per Note above
  • navigate to Manage -> (Core Administration - for SAP Ariba procurement tenant or Administration for SAP ariba sourcing tenant) -> Intelligent Configuration Manager -> Manage Configurations -> [Continue] -> Authentication
  • download and store the appropriate Test or Production SAP Ariba Metadata File

Note: Because of current temporary gap in the SAP Ariba Metadata File generation, manual adjustment to the entityID attribute value is required as per the process described below. 
(assumption here is that the SAP Ariba SSO SAML configuration was already setup and SAP Ariba tenant has SSO enabled)

Manual SAP Ariba Metadata File adjustment process:

  • Run chrome://extensions/ in Google Chrome browser
  • Navigate to Chrome Web Store

  •   Search for SAML Chrome Panel -> [Add to Chrome]

  •  Hit [F12] to open the Chrome DevTools
  • Open your SAP Ariba tenant URL in Google Chrome
    (e.g. https://<SAP Ariba tenant  id>.procurement.ariba.com)
  • Navigate to the Chrome DevTools -> SAML -> copy the value of the SAP Ariba SAML Request saml2:Issuer XML element (e.g. http://<SAP Ariba tenant id>.procurement.ariba.com)

  • Open the  SAP Ariba Metadata File and replace the value of entityID attribute with the value of saml2:Issuer XML element, retrieved from SAP Ariba SAML in the Chrome DevTools and save the modified SAP Ariba Metadata File 

SAP IAS SAML Authentication Configuration

Prerequisites:

  • SAP IAS user added as Administrator to SAP IAS (Users & Authorizations -> Administrators -> [Add])

To configure SAP IAS SAML Authentication with SAP Ariba:

  • enter the SAP IAS Administration Console via https://<SAP IAS tenant  id>.accounts.ondemand.com/admin
  • navigate to Application & Resources -> Application -> [Create] to create Application for SAP Ariba as Service Provider (SP)
    • Enter the Display Name, choose SAP Ariba solution as Type, SAML 2.0 as Protocol Type and hit [Create]

  •  navigate to SAML 2.0 Configuration and upload the adjusted SAP Ariba Metadata File

  • SAML 2.0 configuration is pre-set out of the uploaded SAP Ariba Metadata File

  •  hit [Save]

  •  navigate to Subject Name Identifier and set the Primary Attribute Value to Login Name and hit [Save]

  •  ensure the users setup in SAP IAS have the Login Name set and matching to the SAP Ariba user UniqueName
    • navigate to Users & Authorizations -> User Management -> and specific user SAP IAS Login Name needs to match user SAP Ariba UniqueName

 SAP IAS User Profile:

 SAP Ariba User Profile:

 

 In case you are reading this line, you have successfully configured the Single Sign-On (SSO) between SAP Ariba as Service Provider (SP) and SAP IAS as Identity Provider (IdP)!

SAP Ariba SSO Verification

To verify the status of the SAP Ariba SSO Setup follow one of the options below:

  • Validate the SAP Ariba SSO via Intelligent Configuration Management
  • Validate the SAP Ariba SSO by accessing the SAP Ariba URL in the browser

Validate the SAP Ariba SSO via Intelligent Configuration Management

Prerequisites:

  • SAP Ariba user with Customer Administrator group membership

To review existing SAP Ariba SSO setup:

  • enter the SAP Ariba tenant
  • navigate to Manage -> (Core Administration - for SAP Ariba procurement tenant or Administration for SAP ariba sourcing tenant) -> Intelligent Configuration Manager -> Manage Configurations -> [Continue] -> Authentication
  • check the SAP Ariba SSO configuration for Test or Production

Validate the SAP Ariba SSO by accessing the SAP Ariba URL in the browser

Validate the SAP Ariba SSO setup by accessing the SAP Ariba URL via browser - accessing the business user access URL (e.g. for US DC https://<SAP Ariba tenant id>.sourcing.ariba.com).

Below tests will not work in case browser certificate is used and the business user is logged in to SAP Ariba without entering credentials.

SAP Ariba without SSO

Reaching below SAP Ariba Login screen means, SAP Ariba SSO is not setup and SAP Ariba site requires the user credentials to be entered as stored in SAP Ariba

 

 SAP Ariba with SSO to SAP IAS

Reaching below SAP IAS Login screen means, SAP Ariba SSO is setup with SAP IAS (directly, without further identity federation) and SAP Ariba site requires the user credentials to be entered as stored in SAP IAS

 

SAP Ariba with SSO to Microsoft Entra ID

Reaching below Microsoft Entra ID Login screen means, SAP Ariba SSO is setup with Microsoft Entra ID and SAP Ariba site requires the user credentials to be entered as stored in SAP Microsoft Entra ID

Note: You can achieve the usage of Microsoft Entra ID for SAP Ariba SSO via direct configuration to Microsoft Entra ID or via Identity Federation setup of SAP IAS, in case of Identity Federation, SAP Ariba SSO is setup to SAP IAS and SAP IAS delegates all the authentication requests to Microsoft Entra ID. Because of this we might not be able to recognize whether the SAP Ariba SSO is setup directly with Microsoft Entra ID or via SAP IAS Identity Federation.

See as well: 

  • Summary: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
  • Overview: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

entry.title: Overview: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
See as well: 

  • Summary: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
  • Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

Single Sign-On (SSO), Service Provider (SP), Identity Provider (IdP) and Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy)

 Single Sign-On (SSO) is an authentication and authorization process that allows an User to access multiple enterprise applications with a single set of login credentials (username and password). Service Provider (SP) hosts a service (e.g. SAP Ariba Buying) that User wants to access. This Service Provider (SP) trusts the Identity Provider (IdP) (e.g. SAP IAS or Microsoft Entra ID), which controls the User access. SSO supports various protocols like Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) or OpenID Connect.

Identity Provider (IdP) 

  • System responsible for User authentication
  • Uniquely Identifies the User
  • Contains User Store with and additional User Attributes (name, mail, group membership, ...)
  • Contains User Credentials (username/password)
  • Issues additional User Attributes (name, mail, group membership, ...)
  • Trusts one or multiple Service Providers (SPs)

Service Provider (SP)

  • System delegating User authentication to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Relies on the User identity and User Attributes from Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Trusts single Identity Provider (IdP)

SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication (SAP IAS - SAP Identity Authentication Service) Authentication Scenarios 

SAP Cloud Identity Services is SAP product for authentication and Single Sign-On (SSO) in cloud referred as SAP IAS (Identity Authentication Service) as well. 

To be compliant with the latest SAP Ariba "Next Generation" solutions (e.g. SAP Ariba Category Management, Supplier Profile Summary in SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance, ...) it is mandatory to have the SAP Ariba solutions' Single Sign-On (SSO) setup with SAP IAS (Test or Production).

SAP IAS can be setup as Identity Provider (IdP) or configured with Identity Federation to serve as Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) to another Identity Provider (IdP) -> Customer Managed IdP (e.g. Microsoft Entra ID IdP).

Identity Provider (IdP) - Authentication Scenario

This authentication scenario assumes the User Store and User Credentials persistence in Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS. Thus the user information needs to be available, activated, with generated credentials in Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS. 

To establish the SSO:

  • Metadata needs to be obtained from Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba
  • Application representing the Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba needs to be created in Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS using the metadata retrieved from Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba
  • Metadata needs to be obtained from Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS
  • SSO needs to be configured in Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba using the metadata retrieved from Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS

SSO execution (IdP initiated):

  • User accesses Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba URL
  • Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba will forward the authentication to Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS
  • Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS login window asking for User credentials is shown
  • User is authenticated by Identity Provider (IdP) - SAP IAS, based on the entered credentials and the response with User Identifier and User Attributes is send to Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba

Identity Federation with Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - Authentication Scenario

  Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy)

  • System responsible for User authentication, with conditional Identity Federation to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Uniquely Identifies the User or delegates it to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Can contain User Store and additional User Attributes or delegates it to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Can contain User Credentials or delegates it to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Issues additional User Attributes (name, mail, group membership, ...) or delegates it to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Trusts one or multiple Service Providers (SPs)
  • Can trust one or more Identity Providers (IdPs)

Note: SAP IAS shall be configured as Identity Provider (IdP) also in case of Identity Federation authentication scenario, as Identity Federation as Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) is extension configuration of Identity Provider (IdP) itself.

This authentication scenario assumes the User Credentials persistence is outside SAP IAS in Customer Managed IdP (e.g. Microsoft Entra ID IdP). User Store (containing User Attributes) can be in SAP IAS or outside SAP IAS in Customer Managed IdP (e.g. Microsoft Entra ID IdP). No User Credentials needs to be maintained in SAP IAS as the authentication is forwarded outside SAP IAS in Customer Managed IdP (e.g. Microsoft Entra ID IdP).

Note: In case User Store is required in SAP IAS (e.g. for SAP Ariba SAP Task Center or SAP IAS Group membership access restriction), the users needs to be imported into SAP IAS. One possible way is using automated solution via Identity Provisioning (SAP IPS - SAP Identity Provisioning Service).

To establish the SSO with Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) :

  • Steps from above Identity Provider (IdP) - Authentication Scenario chapter needs to be in place to setup the SSO between Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba and Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS
  • Metadata needs to be obtained from Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS
  • Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS needs to be created as Service Provider (SP) in Customer Managed IdP using the metadata retrieved from Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS
  • Metadata needs to be obtained from Customer Managed IdP
  • Corporate Identity Provider representing the Customer Managed IdP needs to be created in Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS using the metadata retrieved from Customer Managed IdP

SSO execution with Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) (IdP initiated):

  • User accesses SAP Ariba Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba URL
  • Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba will forward the authentication to Identity Provider  Proxy (IdP) - SAP IAS
  • Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS (based on optional condition) forwards the authentication request to Identity Provider (IdP) - Customer Managed IdP
  • Identity Provider (IdP) - Customer Managed IdP (e.g. Microsoft Entra ID IdP) login window asking for User credentials is shown
  • User is authenticated by Identity Provider (IdP) - Customer Managed IdP, based on the entered credentials and the response with User Identifier and User Attributes is send to Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS
  • User authentication with User Identifier and User Attributes is further send from Identity Provider Proxy (IdP Proxy) - SAP IAS to Service Provider (SP) - SAP Ariba

Service Provider (SP) vs Identity Provider (IdP) Initiated Authentication

User can access the resource represented by Service Provider (SP) via one of below approaches

Service Provider (SP) initiated authentication

  • Service Provider (SP) and Identity Provider (IdP) needs to have the signing certificates (part of the metadata) exchanged
  • User accesses the Service Provider (SP) URL
    (e.g. https://<SAP Ariba tenant  id>.procurement.ariba.com)
  • Service Provider (SP) forwards the authentication to Identity Provider (IdP)
  • Identity Provider (IdP) authenticates the User and redirects to Service Provider (SP)

Identity Provider (IdP) initiated authentication

  • Service Provider (SP) needs to have signing certificate of Identity Provider (IdP) (part of the metadata) configured
  • Signing certificate of Service Provider (SP) is not required to be configured in Identity Provider (IdP) in case of IdP initiated authentication
  • IdP Initiated Authentication needs to be enabled in Identity Provider (IdP)
  • User accesses the Identity Provider (IdP) URL with Service Provider (SP) identifier passed
    (e.g. https://< SAP IAS tenant  id>.accounts.ondemand.com/saml2/idp/sso?sp=<service provider name>)
  • Identity Provider (IdP) authenticates the User and redirects to Service Provider (SP)

SAP IAS Landscape Review and Recommendations

Customer can review his SAP IAS landscape via S-User in SAP for Me (https://me.sap.com) -> Systems & Provisioning -> Systems -> Public Cloud Systems

 To be compliant with the latest SAP Ariba "Next Generation" solutions (e.g. SAP Ariba Category Management, Supplier Profile Summary in SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance, ...) it is mandatory to have the SAP Ariba solutions' Single Sign-On (SSO) setup with SAP IAS (Test or Production).

Above means that SAP Ariba Test tenant SSO shall be established with SAP IAS Test and SAP Ariba Production tenant SSO shall be established with SAP IAS Production!

In case customer does not have SAP IAS of type Test provisioned yet, follow the Obtain SAP IAS Tenant procedure.

See as well: 

  • Summary: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
  • Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

entry.title: Re: production orders at work center using cois_select_or...
entry.content:
It would be helpful, if you could provide the input parameters that you used.

In general, use IV_PROD_ORDER_SEL = 'X' and IS_OBJECTS_TO_READ-HEADER = 'X'. Then use the internal ID of your workcenter in CT_IOOPER-ARBID. This should return the relevant oders in CT_IOHEADER.

entry.title: Re: Solution Options for Manufacturing Engineering
entry.content:
The best comprehsive overview of current SAP PP solutions I have seen so far.
Realy good explained. Thanks for that.

entry.title: how to dowland again my integrationsuite once i delete it in sap cpi
Summary: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
Root article grouping the individual topics related to SAP Ariba Single Sign-On (SSO) and SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication (SAP IAS)

  • Overview: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
  • Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
  • Identity Federation: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication (work in progress)

entry.title: /SCWM/L3 832 - Internal error occurred while declaring HU packaging data for WT &&
entry.content:
Dear experts,

When trying to confirm a warehouse task with a nested HU I receive a dump with error message "/SCWM/L3 832 - Internal error occurred while declaring HU packaging data for WT &".

Any idea on what could cause this error?

Thanks and best regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Change basic start date of process order
entry.content:
Hello,

In MD04, we have a process order on 27.05.2024 and for this we have exception message 15 and it shows reschedule out to 19.08.2024.

so we are trying to change start date in process order COR2 to 08.08.2024 and system shows "scheduling carried out see log". when we check log we get a message as operation has been scheduled. However, after saving order, date remains same.

I've attached opuz screencapture

MD04

cor2

Please help in finding what we are missing here

Thanks,

MRuchitha

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Foundry deployment error - BLANK_FORM_ATTRI...
entry.content: hello, have you solved this problem?

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Kolkata SAP Community Group!!!
entry.content: Exam link distribution date

entry.title: Re: Characters that have hexadecimal display between HEX0...
entry.content:
In that case I would suggest to have some sort of formula in your HANA CV, that converts the invalid characters of SGTXT to a space.

I think a

replace_regexpr( '([^[\x00-\x1F]]|[#|!])' in "SGTXT" with ' ' occurrence all )

could do the trick.

entry.title: Re: EPM_OIA_APPS not found
entry.content:
Hi @MauricioMiao,

Are you referring to EPM demo apps for XSA and Classic on-prem installations of HANA Platform?

If so, they are known as SHINE Demo Apps. Please read more here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/42668af650f84f9384a3337bcd373692/27f3e9d4b1e74393939eae4ddc0041d8.html

I believe you would be able to clone the project from github and adapt to run on BTP with some minor changes. 

You could also run the Shopping Cart demo app directly from here (which is the end-result of EPM anyway):

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/demoapps

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas Scripting: Access CDS View on Pub...
entry.content:
Hi Tamas,

thanks for the fast reply! I was able to get it done with the callTransaction function.

Thanks
Daniel

entry.title: Re: production orders at work center using cois_select_or...
entry.content: I have mainly been using IV_PLANNED_ORDER_SEL= X, IS_OBJECTS_TO READ = X, and IT_STATUS_HDR = CNF X. It seems like whenever I try to use the workcenter id in CT_IOOPER-ARBID, CT_IOHEADER returns orders with other workcenters

entry.title: Re: how to dowland again my integrationsuite once i delet...
entry.content:
Hi @bhargav--1,

You cannot access a deleted tenant of Integration Suite. Once you delete it, it will never be available again. Hence, there is no change to retrieve or download any developed artifacts from that tenant once deletion is in progress. 

If you want to create a new instance, you must wait for the one being deleted to finish what it is doing.

If the deletion is taking too long to finish, then open a ticket on SAP support system.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Derivation in SAP Analytics Cloud Planning – Advanced Scenario
entry.content:
Hi Abe,

The notation you're referring to, like "[d/t.S:...]" or "[d/...]", is often used in various contexts, including data science and analytics, to denote different types of dimensions or variables. Here's what each part typically means:

  1. [d/...]: This notation usually indicates a regular dimension or variable, where "d" stands for "dimension." The name following the slash ("/") represents the name of the dimension.

  2. [d/t.S:...]: This notation is a bit more specific. "d" still represents a dimension, but the additional parts provide more information:

    • "t" stands for "time." This suggests that the dimension is related to time, such as dates or timestamps.
    • "S" might stand for "segmentation" or "subsetting," indicating that this dimension might be used for segmenting or subsetting the data.
    • The name following the colon (":") represents the name of the dimension.

So, in summary, "[d/t.S:...]" denotes a time-related dimension that may be used for segmentation or subsetting, while "[d/...]" simply represents a regular dimension. These notations help users understand the nature and purpose of different dimensions within data actions.

entry.title: Re: How to leverage Driver-based Planning
entry.content: Does this work with Scenarios?

entry.title: Re: How to trigger workflow in EC using API to the manager of a Contingent Worker to extend or not e
entry.content:
Very interesting!

@rahulsharma - Would it be possible to share more details on the configuration? Additional screenshots of the Configure Object Definition screen?

I would like even more knowledge on:
How the MDF is configured?
How the iFlow is configured?

entry.title: Re: MIGO error VLA312 for partial delivery
entry.content:
Hello

I faced this problem. 

The partial delivery not allowed is drived by the confirmation sequence of the Set up confirmation control.

The GR assignment needs to be unflagged in confirmation category LA to allow the partial MIGO against the quantity in the inbound delivery. 

Spro>MM>Purchasing>Confirmations>Set up confirmation control>Confirmation control key ( same as the confirmation control keys on the line item in Purchase order) > confirmation sequence> Gr assignment Flag or not accrding to the needs.

Hope it will helps for people in a similar situation

regards,

Ingrid

entry.title: Re: EML Create by association on existing Root
entry.content:
Hi,

How did you solve that??

I'm having the same problem:

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_billingdocumenttp

ENTITY billingdocument

EXECUTE createfromsddocument AUTO FILL CID

WITH VALUE #(

( %param = VALUE #( _reference = VALUE #( ( sddocument = <fs_outbound_delivery>-id-content

%control = VALUE #( sddocument = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ) ) ) ) ) )

 

RESULT DATA(lt_result)

FAILED DATA(ls_failed)

REPORTED DATA(ls_reported).

I«m getting failled 'UNSPECIFIC'

Thanks in advance,
Ines Martins

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: f781435bc99dbd5470997fbef63fe63cf659905f8b489daa4d46940793d9bce8

entry.title: TM - Output request - Sender Country Can't be Initial
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I attempt to view the waybill or any other output in the TM app "Manage freight order" under the tab “Output request” tab and try to preview the output, I encounter the error message: “Sender country/region can’t be initial.” I’ve already filled in the “Sender Country” field in the “Define Rules for determination of Master form templates,” but the issue persists. Additionally, I’ve updated the business partner, but the error remains. Do you have any other solutions for resolving this error? 

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Transportation Management

entry.title: IDOC FAILURE AT EWM SYSTEM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have several idocs processed from ERP but are failing at EWM system. The idoc error is framed as- "No means of transport found for packaging material XXXXXXXX". If anyone has any idea on how to resolve this issue pls help urgently.

entry.title: Re: Enable Services for Object (GOS) in Quality Notificat...
entry.content:
Hi @StefanKonradi 

 

GOS is not enabled in S/4HANA Cloud for Quality Notifications . There is no customizing available to enable it 

Instead , we have the "Linked Documents" and Create Document option where you can upload attachments to Document Info Records .

 

I checked in our internal system and GOS is enabled for Document Info Records so you use that instead and then attached the corresponding DIR the Quality Notification

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: format date after deploy app
entry.content: why it matters? show me your coding. very likely your code issue.

entry.title: Re: Composites in SAP Analytics Cloud.
entry.content: Hi! Thanks for an interesting blog. We are utilizing composites as navigational components in our stories, however there is a strange behaviour, when a composite is dragged to multiple pages. So it appears multiple time in a story. it seems to lose the remote function connection somehow. For example, I import my navigation "NAVI" into the story, drag it into Page 1 and Page 2, rename these widgets to NAV1, NAV2. After the story is saved and reopened, all functions called for NAV1 (like NAV1.setFilters(); ) are marked red as "unused property" or "not a function", whereas the functions for NAV2 work just fine. Is that a bug? It seems we can not use it as a navigation component for multi-page stories right now... Thanks for the answer, Martin

entry.title: Re: Integrate B1 to third party WMS
entry.content: Did you find any sollution please?

entry.title: Customer Engagement apps / roles within SAP S/4 Utilites
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a S/4 Utilities on premise with the stand of late 2021, which already is supposed to contain the customer engagement apps and roles, so e.g. Agent Desktop UI5 app within the role S4C_UT_IC, at least as far I understood it from SAP Help: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/021b182b0c47416c8fafed67ebfd78a9/6bee35f4b26f4a248aa282d379a54976.html?locale=en-US&version=2021.latest

I wasnt able to find this role neither in the pfcg, nor in the SAP fiori apps reference library. Where can I find any technical information on running this on premise, e.g. prerequisites, required components etc? Why is this app not within the SAP library, it isnt supported any longer? I have searched for "Agent Desktop", maybe I have missed something?

I ran through diverse documents provided from SAP like migration guides, SAP Help documentation etc. and didnt found any answers. Im not interested in migrating BP's, contract data etc, I dont want to have any interaction with SAP cloud, all I wanna do is take a shallow look to corresponding fiori applications to have a rough idea if they are suitable to replace old good CIC. Thanks

entry.title: Re: What configuration needs to be done either in ECC(S4)...
entry.content: OK, what engine is that? ChatGPT?

entry.title: Where can I find enabling materials and gain the basic skills necessary for procurement management?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Managing SAP Ariba Procurement learning journey learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is a work in process and courses will be added to the journey as they are completed.
The Managing SAP Ariba Procurement learning journey is curated to elevate the proficiency of learners mastering the nuances of SAP Ariba Procurement management. This curriculum delves into the intricacies of purchasing strategies, contract compliance, catalog management, supplier engagement, and beyond. Learners will navigate the complexities of SAP Ariba with a focus on strategic optimization, efficiency enhancement, and driving significant value through procurement processes. Designed for those who are already familiar with the basics of SAP Ariba, this journey offers deep insights into its more sophisticated capabilities.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, administrators, and business users and consultants will be able to perform basic skills necessary for procurement management.

Prerequisites

  • A basic understanding of SAP Ariba Procurement. 
  • As well as Discovering SAP Ariba Procurement.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: F4 Help for custom fields created using Custom Fields & Logic - InApp Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

Can In-App extensibility be used to add a drop down field with values from a custom table? This is for Create Purchase Requisition App - F1643.

Thanks,

Smitha

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content: I filled up the form for SIT 2024 yesterday but haven't received the link for the MCQ test yet which is scheduled for tomorrow. Kindly tell us when will we receive it.

entry.title: BRF+; sales order confirmation on item level
entry.content: We are using BRF+ to submit the EDI sales order confirmation (ORDER_CONFIRMATION) and order changes (ORDER_CONFIRMATION_CHANGE). By standard this is a header message, but we want to have this on item level. Only comfirmed items should be in the message for standard items, and third party items should be included when the PO is created and confirmed. Every time a sales order item is confirmed, a new message should be triggered containing all confirmed items. So far, we could not find a way to do this using BRF+. Has anyone a solution to this issue?

entry.title: Re: Important Update: Changes to the Free Tier Option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: Hi @SergioFerrariIt , the Custom Code Migration app is part of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment and is also impected by this change.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@MioYasutake 

Northwind is getting the same CORS error. 

 

Yes, I'm doing a GET call in the controller. I was struggling to get the Odata call to work using the normal configuration. I assumed the Taskwrapper solution was creating some issues, so I went with an ajax call in the controller.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP CAP with IntelliJ
entry.content:
Hello Nils,

CAP CDS Language Support for IntelliJ is now publicly available at https://github.com/cap-js/cds-intellij for users of commercial IntelliJ IDEs including IDEA Ultimate and WebStorm. (Since the plugin builds upon JetBrains' LSP API, it is unavailable in IDEA Community.)

Feel free to download and install the IDE plugin from GitHub. And let us know in case anything seems missing or broken.

We'll update here once the plugin is available in JetBrains Marketplace (integrated in the IDE).

Best regards,
Tim

entry.title: Dynamic calendar view in SAC
entry.content:
Is there a way to get a dynamic view like the below

for a dynamic range too. I want the user to be able to arbitrarily select any two start and end dates from the data ideally in a calendar view.  The biggest use case is just last month, last quarter and last year but id like to have that option. Im having a hard time seeing such a functionality. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

stage building in TM is done for adv ICo stock transfers in the same manner as for other processes.
Stage building is done automatically (based on customizing of logistics integration profiles) and can be amended manually.
For adv ICo stock transfers freight costs are assigned to the respective company based on the intercompany Incoterms.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Re: How to create batch PO by BO interface after excel upload immediately?
entry.content:
Hello,

How did you solve that?

Thanks,
Ines Martins

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Hi @HangTRAN,

@maseitner,

It looks like Porsche is live with the new job search https://jobs.porsche.com/index.php?ac=search_result  .
Unfortunately, have no knowledge who implemented it and it looks like custom software.
What do you think?
Best regards
Helene

entry.title: Error 403 when calling Process Automation API on deployed SAP Build App
entry.content:
Hi all,

currently i'm facing an issue, where I receive an error 403 on trying to start my Process Automation workflow with this API: https://api.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/path/post_v1_workflow_instances.
It's working when I start it with Postman. On the preview-version from SAP Build Apps it is also working fine.

But on the deployed version it isn't working. 
I found out, that the bearer token is missing:

The common request header is filled. It looks like the data query "query.authConfig.authToken" is empty.

Does anybody has an idea what's wrong here? In the past it worked like a charm.

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: SAC BW Live - No automatic YoY or Previous Period or Variance Calculations when using 0CALMONTH ?
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

can somebody remind me what the prereqs are for having automated calculations like YoY etc. for a BW live model. Do I need 0CALDAY in it? Right now I just have 0CALMONTH and nowhere the auto calculations show up.

Is that on purpose? 

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Re: Transfer Project Subcontracting stock (R) to Project...
entry.content:
Hi kusapcrespin,

Unfortunately, I have the same problem and can't find anything about it. Have you already solved the request?
If so, can you please share the solution?
Best regards
Ivan

entry.title: SAP Beginner
entry.content: Hi everyone.  I am new to SAP and currently using a Udemy course in addition to the free resources so I can get certified in the next 30 days

entry.title: Re: Adding general task list into maintenance order
entry.content: Hi Pete! Derek Thom here! Remember me?!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Subject: Request for Free SAP Certification Exam Attempt

Dear David Chaviano,

I trust this message finds you well. I'm reaching out to request assistance in securing a complimentary attempt at the SAP certification exam. My name is Tam Phan, and I'm a third-year student delving into the world of ERP. I'm eager to augment my expertise and knowledge through obtaining the SAP certification.

As a woman, I'm committed to advancing my career within the technology sector. I firmly believe that obtaining the SAP certification will widen my career prospects and furnish me with the essential skills to thrive in this field.

Recognizing that exam registration may entail financial obligations, I'm seeking support to participate without financial constraints. I sincerely hope for your consideration and support in this matter.

Thank you for your attention to my request.

Warm regards,

Tam Phan

entry.title: Do we have any certification related to SAP build (covering build process automation)?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I can see that the citizen developer (LCNC) certification that was available before is not active at the moment. Do we have anything else available except C_WZADM_01?
